description: Constraint-based kitchen design instruction prompt files with atomic blind-corner validation, functional access checks, visible filler rules, and countertop corner validation.
algorithmOrder: Extract design intent and design mode
Read scene, derived helpers, catalog, and user request
Split base/tall/wall layers into usable spans
Reserve fixed input objects and appliances
Solve blind corners as complete atomic candidates
Validate solid collision, blind door access, visible filler placement, and countertop corner overlap
Fill usable spans with no unexplained gaps
Rerun full validation after any fix
